words.def: be shown or be found to be
be shown or be found to be
words.zh: vt. 證明, 查驗, 檢驗, 勘探, 顯示

words.def: (cricket) the division of play during which six balls are bowled at the batsman by one player from the other team from the same end of the pitch
words.zh: adv. 結束, 越過, 從頭到尾

words.def: a shape that is spherical and small
words.zh: n. 滴, 微量, 落下, 空投

words.def: an athlete who plays for pay
red color or pigment; the chromatic color resembling the hue of blood
words.zh: a. 紅的, 紅色的, 紅腫的, 流血的
